name: PitchBook
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community MCP server was identified in the provided documentation; PitchBook has focused on direct integrations with specific AI platforms like Claude and Microsoft 365 Copilot rather than a general-purpose MCP server.
one_liner: PitchBook provides a data platform for private capital market intelligence including company, deal, investor, and fund information.
api_notes: The API is a RESTful implementation (https://api.pitchbook.com) offering various relational endpoints including companies, deals, financing, and fund information. Broadness is moderate as it provides significant but specific data retrieval capabilities rather than full platform control.
blocker: Requires a paid standalone contract and contact with the Direct Data team to purchase credits/API access.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed using an API key passed in the Authorization header as 'PB-Token {API_KEY}'.
access_notes: API access requires a standalone contract agreement and the purchase of API credits or a specific subscription; it is not available via self-serve free or trial accounts.

evidence.claim: PitchBook’s API solution is a separate offering that requires a standalone contract agreement.
The PitchBook API v2 provides real-time access to company data; it requires an API key and the purchase of API credits.
Search citation: Private Market Data, Research & Tools - PitchBook
Search citation: Power financial workflows with PitchBook Direct Data - PitchBook
